name: Funny Puzzle: Cats
description: Each level is a separate picture that needs to be assembled from many pieces. You will have to be patient and attentive to correctly place all the puzzle pieces on the playing field. The game offers a variety of difficulty levels, so everyone can find a suitable one for themselves. In addition, you can compete with other players on the leaderboard to find out which one of you is the best cat puzzle collector. Pleasant music and atmosphere will help you relax and enjoy the game process. The game is a great way to spend time enjoying the company of cute furry friends and solving interesting puzzles.
instructions: Click on the pieces of the picture to rotate them Once all the pieces are rotated correctly the level will be completed Complete the levels and collect stars to increase your ranking in the top
